LAW AND MOTION 302, THE AXEL LAW PARTNERS LLP'S MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT TITAN STUDENT COMMUNITIES LLC, DBA CAMPUS HABITAT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING RE-FILED UPON PROOF OF PROPER SERVICE.
